title: Paint booth exhaust fan making loud noise
description: Bay 3 exhaust fan has been rattling since morning. Makes it hard to hear others and I am worried it will break down during a job.

title: Which polish compound for matte finish cars?
description: Got a matte black Kia Seltos today. Not sure which compound to use — the usual one left swirl marks last time.

title: Spray gun pressure dropping mid-job
description: The Sata 5000 in Bay 1 loses pressure after 10-15 mins of use. Has to be restarted.

title: Do I need to log a PDI check for wheel alignment?
description: New SOP says PDI for every refurb but not clear if wheel alignment counts.

title: Tablet in QC bay not connecting to Wi-Fi
description: The Samsung tablet we use for checklists keeps dropping Wi-Fi.

title: How to handle customer who wants to inspect during refurb?
description: Customer called asking to visit during the refurb.

title: Battery tester showing wrong readings
description: CTEK tester shows 11.8V for a battery that is actually 12.6V.
